pages.text: Skewering two frog legs with cabbage leaves and meat yields these juicy, savory grilled frog legs.$(br)Succulent and flavorful, when chewed thoroughly only delicate charred bones and the enticing aroma of skin and flesh remain between your teeth.$(br)Grants consumer$(br)$(li)1-minute Frog Legs$(li)20-second Regeneration II

pages.title: Frog Leg Sandwich
pages.text: Considered a delicacy in certain nations, one can taste bold brushstrokes and swampy undertones in this dish.$(br)What do you mean meatballs have lower priority than sandwiches?
